prompt: create a website mock-up showcasing a sleek, dark-mode trading dashboard featuring teal, white, and gray accents. The interface includes a vertical navigation menu, a watchlist table with market assets and price changes, a candlestick chart with customized indicators, an order-ticket panel, and a scrolling news feed, all presented with minimalist design elements and clear, modern typography.
prompt_refined: Generate a sleek, dark-mode website mock-up of a trading dashboard. The interface features prominent teal, white, and gray elements and accents. On the far left, a vertical navigation menu. To the right of the navigation, in the upper-left section of the main content area, place a watchlist table displaying market assets and real-time price changes. Position a large candlestick chart with customized indicators as the central and most prominent element of the dashboard. In the upper-right section of the main content area, include an order-ticket panel. A scrolling news feed should be visible in the bottom section of the dashboard. The overall design should be minimalist with clear, modern typography.
objects: vertical navigation menu (on the far left)
watchlist table (in the upper-left section of the main content area)
large candlestick chart (central and most prominent element)
order-ticket panel (in the upper-right section of the main content area)
scrolling news feed (in the bottom section of the dashboard)
minimalist design with clear, modern typography
